description.value:
Cost: 1 Effect: Draw a weapon or stow it in its sheath/holster. Can draw/stow ONE weapon as a [Free] action once per turn as part of movement. Drawing two weapons requires Quick Draw feat or two separate actions. Doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks

Evening Treatment

Cost: During long rest. Effect: Make a [[/check skill=medicine]] before the patient sleeps. If self administered: Add 1 to skill die Once per long rest, per patient. Using a healer's kit subtracts 1 from one Medicine die regardless of who is administering.

  • 1 success: Patient regains an additional HP equal to the treating character's Wisdom score during the long rest (added to the standard Constitution × 4 recovery).
  • 2 successes: Patient regains additional HP equal to the treating character's Wisdom × 2. Additionally, the patient removes one level of Exhaustion beyond the standard one removed by long rest.

system.effect:
Make a Medicine check before the patient sleeps. If self administered: Add 1 to skill die  Once per long rest, per patient. Using a healer's kit subtracts 1 from one Medicine die regardless of who is administering.
- **1 success:** Patient regains an additional HP equal to the treating character's Wisdom score during the long rest (added to the standard Constitution × 4 recovery).
- **2 successes:** Patient regains additional HP equal to the treating character's Wisdom × 2. Additionally, the patient removes one level of Exhaustion beyond the standard one removed by long rest.
